title: Questions of strength, weakness,personal hobbies and favourites asked in interviews
author: Priya
content:
Basic Questionaire 

  •  Hard work or smart work difference .

~ A hard or a smart worker both do their work with perfection but what distinguishes them is the way they approach a problem , dealt with it and find a plausible , effective work strategy to tackle with it . A hard worker uses more muscle strength but less mental power but a smart worker is more dextrous and sharp minded in finding a quick way out for an impending issue. 

And when somebody ask which is more important a hard work or a smart work than ofcourse it is smart work because everyone wants good outcome in quick span without having to work endlessly with some old , impractical approach but with an easy , smart way with minimum effort for a desired output . But To be a smart worker demands one's activeness in work , skillful execution , and mindfulness to drive u through an excellent work output. And only hard work makes u capable to handle a work become adept in it to be a smart worker.So,both r important bcoz there is no smart work without a hard work.


 ? How do you handle stress,pressure, anxiety, criticism .

~ Working with people who are troubling and a bully to us r a real neck in the pain and 1 can get overwhelmed with their annoying , Ill habits to torture someone but maintain calm without being gushy to speak upfront about their activities and by being ignorant and insensitive to every criticism and trolls we can outsmart every blocker, stumbling blocks at our workplace.

And having work stress and anxiety due to constant pressure from seniors is not avoidable but 1 can manage it by being a vivacious, work centric employee who works on delivering results rather than concerning about the mistreatment given at work through criticism by other staff members or boss's nutty nature.

 ? How do you deal with angry or irritated client. 

~ If u r working for a client than u have to make clear that all their inputs r clearly answered and their shouldn't be any expectations that rn't met because any dissatisfaction at client's end could lead to disharmony and may also result in impeding your work performance due to bad work output and could also cause client's disengagement and dismissal of the project work u r dealing with.

And if client is not satisfied with your work performance and make complaints or show some aggression than never turn them down by demeaning them or showing as if u r an ideal , highly competent employee in a way to show your strength to cover up your weaknesses .If u r wrong than admit it and if not than also try to make do with your clients attitude and work in a way to not give them an another chance to burst on u or in picking faults in your work.

 ? Any regret or disappointment that you think couldn?t be retreated or retract.

~ I met through many such bad experiences those were disappointing for me and still have some guilt for them .Like many times it has happened to me that I hurt my own people who were closest to me at times by not being with them when they needed me the most.And 1 can't patched up these broken relationships with some pleasantries of gift or money.And it really pinches me deep into my heart and I regret for loosing such dearest people .

And I remember 1 more incident of my school age when I was caught cheating in exam my exam got cancelled and I was debarred from ever appearing for that exam in the future .This was a biggest blow to my academic future and also my career that could have been shaped much better than what I am now in the current moment.

 ? Any tough/difficult decision you have taken in your past life. 

~ For me my family is my everything and I sacrificed my happiness by leaving my family for my own good. And we say that "to gain something we lose something" and that's my family for my career.This is a biggest decision I took to go and live somewhere else keeping my family away just to give a good beginning to my career with my job . And initially it was much difficult for me to live without people i love the most but with time i made myself much self reliant and independent by doing my work myself without an external support.

 ? Any celebrity or historical figure you admire the most. 

~ With the current world order i find Donald Trump and Xi jingpin most influential leaders of all time.Their supremecy their leadership is the most winning and rewarding with the way of their engagement in global diplomacy ,trade union and in tackling with the geographic disposition of war of territorial disputes, oil sanction and raging war for space and autonomy.World is racing for oil and semiconductor supply in abundance and I think a new world war could have its immediate effect among countries without diplomats like them. And for me they are the strongest figure whom I admire the most.

 ? Your favourite food.

~ I don't have any specifics on type of food I eat . I enjoy eating everything healthy snacks , sweets , all type of Indian food . I am not drawn to any special kind of dish and happily eat whatever comes on my plate. And about my taste , my preferred food choice is for more spicy less sweet.I love eating food extra spicy , properly seasoned with pepper ,salt .

My love for eating is beyond words. I love eating and much fond of eating Gujarat dishes because they r much light weight , quick to digest and 1 can eat them at almost all time in breakfast,lunch or dinner .Even I tried many Gujarati cuisines - dhokla, fafda , thepla and I loved them all .

* Your hobbies. 

~ In my free time I read some novels ,do cooking or sing. 

-> I love reading Novels that r not fictional based on someone's life like someone's memoir or biography.And also like reading sci-fi novels with which we can know of different unimaginative facts and figures of space , universe , things happening in nature ,or some scientific unexplored theories .

-> In food, typically I cook some North Indian dishes which we eat in our regular meal rice ,dal , chapati .In free time , I try some other dishes too like - maharashtrian Poha , Gujrati dhokla , Chinese noodles , South Indian Upma sometimes .or some international cuisines depends I have all required ingredients 

-> Listening to songs is something I do at all time whenever I am free and have no work to do , when I am stressed out due to sadness or extra workload and sometimes when I am much overjoyed with happiness. And mostly I listen some fast tuned party songs , pop music or hip hop with some raps. I also give ears to our traditional indian songs or contemporary sometimes.

* Which genre of movie u watch.

~ I watch all type of movies - action based movies, horror or romantic type , sci-fi , comedy , movies based on independence , border war or made on someone's life . Well my preferred 1 is horror.I like ghostly movie , unrealistic characters with lots of thrill , souls entering into bodies , of haunted house , evil dead bodies reawakening , shapeshifters ., some of fights and kickbacks on human demonic characters.

 ? can you relocate .

~ yeah, I can relocate to Bengalore/Pune/Hyderabad .I can do all necessary arrangements and move whenever I will be asked. And if I have to make any travel in temporarily basis I can plan my visit required I am pre informed atleast a week earlier for travel bookings, housing and other arrangements.

 ? 3 things that are most important for you to make You a goal achiever.                             

                                           Or

 Mention your 3 soft skills. 

~ I am multi-disciplined in different sectors.In science , technology , networking and others too. I can cook for myself ,knows swimming, singing, dancing , some literary work. (Versatile in my work)

I stick to my timelines of working to complete my work well before time . I never wait for any last minute rush and works very pre-maturely in the right hours to give a successful closure to my work. (Punctual to time)

I am an sprinter when it comes to setting goal-points and meeting agenda.To meet deadlines I can work hours and hours late to reach my target. (Target oriented)

 ? What are your expectations FROM the company. 

~ After working for your company, the minimum I want for me is to have good technical knowledge in my field of working , a reputable position in the company after serving my long years and a goodwill among all my peers with whom I worked as a single team to troubleshoot their issues , solving their problems , helping them with every minor and critical task.

 ? What are the things that are most important for an employee to be a valuable asset for the company.

~ An honesty and loyalty is the 1st important factor that a company look for in their employees. As an employee , working with your heart is equally important than just using your brain. If u work with dedication by giving your extra time and effort into work it will make u in your company's good book and also would bring lots of admiration and praise for self and huge growth for the company.And it's also required to surround yourself with people of growth mindset who serve similar interests as yours in building a good fortune for the company . A selfless attitude and good companionship of people r the things company need in their employees for a progressive growth and economic productivity of the company.

 ? Why you want to work in this company ?

~ For me working for this company could advance me in my career with all those skills and knowledge that could make me to thrive in the corporate world ,get huge success with a good profile of my work as a professional . And also I have all those tech skills that company is seeking into and working in this area could make me smooth , active in handling complex problems and in gaining a technical excellence , professional growth , and financial stability to sustain and grow in all front personally, socially and also in the organisation I am working.

 ? How will you. handle the situation if the priorities of the project gets change ?

~ If we r trained in a certain field than no matter what difficulties comes at us we would be adept in dealing with it .If I have to work on some difficult situation in project than I will make myself prepared for all adversities and emergency to handle every complex scenario with my intelligence and righteous attitude . And will be available for the company in every critical thinking, regression and analysis to handle the project as required. And even if project requirements changed , with all my diligence I will look into every essentials ,key things and incase project is looking for something specific to be done on priority I would keep my close eye on all such requirements to act on it for immediate effect.

Important HR and Managerial Interview Tips

  • Maintain confidence and speak clearly during HR and managerial rounds.
  • Use practical examples while answering scenario based and behavioral questions.
  • Prepare answers for strengths, weaknesses, leadership and teamwork questions beforehand.
  • Avoid giving overly negative answers about previous companies or managers.
  • Use professional communication and maintain positive body language during interviews.
  • For managerial interviews, focus on leadership, conflict resolution and decision making abilities.
  • While answering behavioral questions, use the STAR method ? Situation, Task, Action and Result.
  • Research the company and job role before appearing for HR interviews.
  • Practice self introduction and project explanation multiple times before the interview.
  • Be honest in your answers instead of using memorized responses.
